headline: Reliance Industries beats Q3 estimates as profit surges on strong retail growth
body: Reliance reported record quarterly profit, exceeding analyst expectations driven by robust retail and telecom gains.

headline: Infosys downgrade: brokerage warns of weak guidance and margin decline
body: Analysts cut Infosys targets citing weak deal pipeline and disappointing guidance for the coming quarters.

headline: RBI holds repo rate steady, signals cautious stance on inflation
body: The central bank kept the repo rate unchanged, maintaining a neutral monetary stance amid sticky inflation.

headline: SEBI launches probe into Adani Enterprises over disclosure lapses
body: Regulator opens investigation, sending shares lower amid fraud and compliance concerns.

headline: TCS wins record multi-year deal, signals strong order book and growth
body: Tata Consultancy Services announced a large contract win, boosting its order book and revenue outlook.

headline: Tata Motors jumps as EV sales soar and exports expand
body: Tata Motors gains on strong electric vehicle sales growth and robust export momentum.

headline: HDFC Bank to acquire stake in fintech startup in strategic deal
body: HDFC Bank announced an acquisition to expand its digital banking footprint.

headline: Banking sector under pressure as RBI tightens NPA norms
body: PSU banks slump on regulatory tightening and rising provisioning requirements.

headline: Reliance Industries posts strong profit beating estimates on retail surge
body: Duplicate-style reprint of the Reliance earnings beat story for dedup testing.
